# CANON REFERENCE DOCUMENT

## The Crimson Covenant Chronicles

---

# CHARACTER FACTS

## VERA DROWNED

**Full Name**: Vera Drowned
**Covenant Codename**: Salt-Hand (adopted surname "Salt" used in Flotilla exile)
**Birth**: Year 254 (Current Era)
**Current Age**: 37 years old
- Appears in mid-fifties due to bloodforge deterioration
- Fifteen years of bloodforge use have physically aged her approximately 18-20 years beyond actual age

**Physical Description**:
- Height: 5'7"
- Build: Lean, economical
- Hair: Dark with silver threading, cropped short
- Face: Deep lines around mouth, webwork of wrinkles at eyes
- Left Hand: Salt-white scarring from blood-burn (mark of practitioner who pulled too much essence in single working); scars weep clear fluid on humid days
- Arms: Scars laddering forearms like tally marks
- Distinctive Mark: Crimson teardrop behind left ear (Blooded rank marker), surrounded by 37 smaller marks counting kills (tattoos faded from four years without renewal)
- Movement: Constantly coiled, weight balanced, never still
- Hands: Never stop moving (fingers tap against thighs, adjust buckles, trace scars)

**Equipment**:
- Loose linen shirts and salt-stiffened trousers (hide weapons)
- Throwing knives strapped along forearms
- Iron-weighted sap in left pocket
- Tideglass-notes in pouch

**Personality Traits (Plot-Affecting)**:
- Speaks rarely; sentences are short (3-7 words), stripped of ornamentation
- Working-class Verathian vocabulary, no Cedarhold affectation
- Addresses people by activity: *"You with the lantern"*
- Ends declarative statements with falling intonation
- Agitation manifests as complete silence (dangerous)
- Repeats last word of sentence when processing: *"Stay. Stay here. I'm going to find her. Find her and bring her back."*
- Counting habit (tallying deaths, names of the dead)
- Performs normalcy while feeling hollow

**Core Wound**: Believes she is "destruction wearing human skin." Every person she loved came to grief. Parents drowned in flood when she was 12. Mentor killed on her first solo mission at age 14. Every life she's touched corroded by proximity to her.

**The Lie She Believes**: *I can protect her by staying away. I can keep her safe if I'm not in her life. My absence is a kind of love.*

**What She Wants**: Mira back, alive and whole. To walk into Pale Tower, kill everyone responsible, walk out with daughter before breakfast. Wants it clean and bloodless—for Mira's sake.

**What She Needs**: To accept her hands will never be clean, violence is part of her nature, and this doesn't make her unworthy of love. To believe the woman who killed 37 people can raise a child who never has to kill.

**Key Transformation Choice**: Must choose between taking Mira and running (lifelong pursuit) OR burning the breeding program to the ground (fight never ends, but Mira will never be hunted again). She chooses the fire.

**Knowledge Boundaries**:
- KNOWS: Breeding program exists; smuggled evidence of it four years ago; evidence hidden somewhere Covenant cannot reach; Mira is Vessel-class; Covenant's internal structure; location of Pale Tower and general facility location
- DOESN'T KNOW: Exact location of hidden evidence; what is on sub-level beneath facility; whether "something old" beneath facility is connected to tideglass source; what Mira's "processing" status is

---

## MIRA DROWNED

**Full Name**: Mira Drowned
**Age**: 7 years old (born Year 284)
**Classification**: Vessel-class Bloodwright (spontaneous manifestation)

**Physical Description**:
- Small for age, wiry
- Hair: Dark
- Cheekbones: Sharp (mother's)
- Nose: Scattered freckles Vera called "the salt scattered on your face, little tide"
- Eyes: Too old for her face; Vessel-class activation has accelerated emotional development
- Nervous Habit: Picks at cuticles until they bleed
- Wears: Overalls with many pockets, cousin's hand-me-downs, waterproofed canvas shoes
- Comfort Object: Stuffed seabird, carved, missing half its beak
- Learned to swim before reading

**Personality Traits**:
- Speaks in fragments (learned adults don't listen to long sentences from children)
- Asks questions that are really statements: *"You're going to come back, right?"*
- Learned to read rooms before words
- Code-switches without knowing: monastery formalities with sad adults, Flotilla bluntness with safe people
- Crying: Silent, tears sliding while face stays composed (learned crying attracts attention)
- Emotional intensity: Feels everything at triple intensity due to Vessel-class

**Core Wound**: Abandoned twice. First by mother who visited but never stayed. Second by everyone when Covenant came. No framework for love that isn't conditional, intermittent, wrapped in operational necessity.

**The Lie She Believes**: *I made them leave. If I was different—quieter, better, less strange—they wouldn't have had to go.*

**What She Wants**: Her mother's specific physical presence, not visits or gifts. To stop being passed between people who tolerate her. To belong somewhere.

**What She Needs**: To understand she didn't make anyone leave, her strange blood doesn't make her monstrous, and someone can love her without conditions or contracts.

**Current State**: Taken by Covenant in way designed to minimize trauma (they wanted her functional). Watched them hurt people she loved to make her come quietly. Didn't scream until they were gone. Cried for six hours straight. Hasn't stopped feeling tears pooling since.

**Knowledge Boundaries**:
- KNOWS: She has power that makes adults flinch; something is wrong with her; mother leaves and returns unpredictably; adults lie to children
- DOESN'T KNOW: She is Vessel-class; what that means; why the Covenant wants her; why her mother really left

---

## VEX MORRETH

**Full Name**: Vex Morreth
**Title**: Primarch of the Crimson Covenant
**Age**: Unknown (was junior Bloodlord during Pale Tower Incident, Year 289—4 years before present)

**Physical Description**:
- Build: Fat (not strong), larger than Vera remembers
- Face: Bloodforge tattoos cover so much of face that expression is hard to read
- Voice: Low, cultured, patient

**Background**: Former dockworker who rose through ranks by being most ruthless killer in Covenant history. Killed previous Primarch Cressa Voidhand in single combat Year 289 and took control.

**Relationship to Vera**: Knew her as rising Bloodlord when she was Covenant's best blade. Respected her work; she respected his ruthlessness. They understood each other. Never friends (friendships are vulnerabilities). This understanding makes him more dangerous—knows how she thinks, her tells, weaknesses, shape of her mercy.

**Knowledge**: Knows Vera has evidence against Covenant leadership; knows Vera is desperate about Mira; knows Vera's operational patterns; made strategic decision to bring Vera back rather than hunt her.

---

## KAEL MORRETH

**Full Name**: Kael Morreth
**Title**: Adopted heir of Vex Morreth; handler of breeding program
**Bloodlordship**: Commands breeding program operations
**Relation to Vex**: Adopted daughter, not biological

**Physical Description**: Not specified in detail; woman whose presence makes Vera's blood run cold

**Background**: Raised in Covenant, trained by Vex himself, believes in organization's purpose of creating most powerful Bloodwrights in history

**Current State**: Beginning to question whether purpose justifies cost. Watching Sera, watching other children, starting to wonder. Cannot ask questions without appearing disloyal.

**Knowledge**: Oversees breeding program directly; watches Vera's sessions with Sera through one-way mirror; reports progress to Vex; has access to all program records

**Arc**: Will eventually make a choice (Chapter 20) that shows her loyalty cracking

---

## THANE GREYSALT

**Full Name**: Thane Greysalt
**Title**: Information broker
**Age**: Old (hair completely white, hands shake)

**Background**: Watched Mira for four years in exchange for Vera's favor. Sent regular reports to Covenant about Mira's location. Essentially maintained surveillance on Vera's daughter at Covenant's behest.

**Rationale**: *"You knew they'd come eventually. We all knew. I gave you four years. That's more than most people get."*

**Relationship to Vera**: Transactional; doesn't trust him but trusts his greed; history of favors between them

**Knowledge**: Location of main breeding facility; guard rotation schedules; names of key personnel; existence of "something old" beneath facility (doesn't know what it is); sub-level survivors are "not the same"

**Price for Information**: A favor—*"Someday I'll call on you. When I need someone dead. You won't ask questions. You won't hesitate. You'll do it."* (blood-contract in all but name)

**Physical Detail**: Shaking hands—age, bloodforge damage, or both

---

## ELDER SALTHORN

**Title**: Keeper of the Well; leader of Tidewell Monastery
**Faction**: Tidewell Monastery (spiritual authority and practical medical power)
**Stance**: Maintains strict neutrality

**Context**: Monastery young priestesses have shown increasing sympathy for Flotilla refugees; Elder maintains neutrality despite this

**Abilities**: Can excommunicate anyone from temple services (death sentence in region where illness/injury are constant threats)

---

## SERA

**Name**: Sera
**Age**: 9 years old
**Classification**: Vessel-class Bloodwright
**Location**: Sealed room at edge of Pale Tower

**Physical State**: Curled in corner, arms wrapped around self, eyes closed, bleeds from nose, screams without sound

**Diagnosis**: Child pushed too hard too fast, damaged her own essence pathways; training broke her

**Background**: One of the breeding program's Vessel-class children; becoming unresponsive (stopped eating, stopped speaking, stopped manifesting power)

**Threat Made to Her**: *"They're going to make me forget. They said if I can't learn, they'll take my memories and give me to someone else."* (Memory Drop technique)

**Response to Vera**: Opens eyes when Vera uses blood-sensing; recognizes *"You're like me"*; blood slows frantic movement; whispers

**Prognosis**: Will be "processed tonight" if she fails—disposed of quietly, drowned in Drowning Pools, file marked "unresponsive"

---

## BLOODLORDS (The Five)

**Bloodlord Brekk Saltblood**: Commands Verath operations
**Bloodlord The Silent Drowned**: Commands Flotilla network
**Bloodlord Ash Weaver**: Commands poison trade
**Bloodlord Corvin**: Commands tideglass harvesting operations
**Bloodlord Kael Morreth**: Commands breeding program

---

# POLITICAL FACTS

## Faction Territories

**Dockward Council**: Controls Verath surface affairs and Harbor Authority (only legal port in region)

**Crimson Covenant**:
- Headquarters: Pale Tower (rocky outcrop south of Verath)
- Operations: Verath cell, Cedarhold cell, Flotilla network, poison trade, tideglass harvesting
- Breeding facility: Tidal island northeast of Verath, accessible only at low tide

**Tidewell Monastery**: Neutral ground; holds spiritual and medical authority

**Cedarhold**: Highland forested region south of Verath; source of timber (most valuable trade good besides salt)

**The Salt Flotilla**: Nominally outside Verath's jurisdiction; Covenant maintains considerable influence

## Power Hierarchies

**Covenant Structure**:
1. **Primarch** (Vex Morreth) — absolute rule, blood-oath from all members
2. **Bloodlords** (5) — oversee major operations
3. **Blooded** — full members, completed Trial of Three Cuts (3 kills, 3 days, 3 methods)
4. **Tithed** — indentured servants, work most dangerous jobs (tideglass diving has 2-year life expectancy)
5. **Oathbound** — external contractors bound by blood-contract; refusing service triggers blood-sickness death

**Dockward Council Structure**:
- Members elected by property owners (oligarchic)
- Controls Harbor Authority

**Tidewell Monastery**
